prompt:
Design for a real macOS product named 观察者 / Observer. It is a friendly, playful product that watches app/system state and changes icon state when something needs attention.
Create a single square logo concept board, not a marketing poster. Show one polished large app icon and a neat row/grid of small menu bar/status variants: normal, scanning, minor issue, warning, critical, paused, offline.
The icon system must be readable at 16px-24px menu bar size. Use shape changes as well as color, so states remain understandable in monochrome.
Style: clean vector-friendly, modern macOS app icon polish, crisp edges, rounded geometry, restrained friendly personality.
Palette: graphite/white base, teal normal, blue scanning, amber/yellow warning, orange alert, coral red critical, neutral gray paused/offline.
Avoid realistic eyes, surveillance camera feeling, robot heads, circuit boards, generic AI purple-blue gradients, tiny unreadable text, watermark, mockup devices, and text inside icons.

Direction: Abstract Chinese “观” mark.
Core mark: abstract the Chinese character 观 into a geometric window-like symbol with a teal observation dot. Distinctive, Chinese-language native, brandable, still friendly and readable at small sizes.
Composition: large app icon plus status variants using the same abstract character skeleton with scan arc, warning dot, critical pulse, pause mark, and offline slash.
